title: BulletRenderObject (client render data object, non-Entity)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1233-1267 (BulletRenderObject design: fields, non-Entity, API methods, client-only)
acceptance_criteria: BulletRenderObject class exists as pure client-side data object (NOT an Entity, NOT registered to EntityType)

Fields: int bulletId, Vec3 position, Vec3 prevPosition, Vec3 direction, ResourceLocation texture (billboard mode), ResourceLocation modelLocation (3d mode), String renderMode ('billboard'/'3d'), float scale

API methods: getBulletId(), getPosition(), getDirection(), setTexture(ResourceLocation), setScale(float), setRenderMode(String), getPrevPosition(), setPrevPosition(Vec3), setPosition(Vec3), setDirection(Vec3)
Class is immutable-friendly: position updates create new Vec3 or update prevPosition before setting new position
No Minecraft entity lifecycle methods (no tick(), no save(), no entity registration)
